fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: South Carolina Occupational Therapist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a occupational therapist? Here's whether your license transfers to South Carolina - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: occupational therapist license reciprocity south carolina, how to transfer occupational therapist license to south carolina, occupational therapist compact south carolina, south carolina occupational therapist endorsement application

board.name: South Carolina Board of Occupational Therapy
board.parent_dept: South Carolina Department of Labor, Licensing and Regulation (LLR)
board.mailing_address:
South Carolina Board of Occupational Therapy
PO Box 11329
Columbia, SC 29211-1329

license_types.title: Occupational Therapist Registered (OTR)
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice occupational therapy independently in South Carolina.

license_types.title: Certified Occupational Therapy Assistant (COTA)
license_types.description: Requires an associate degree and practicing under the supervision of a licensed OTR.

steps.title: Create Account and Submit Online Application
steps.description: Register or log in to the LLR Online Services Portal, then complete and submit the application for Occupational Therapist licensure, choosing either 'Licensure by Examination' or 'Licensure by Endorsement'.

steps.title: Submit Official Transcripts
steps.description: Request your accredited occupational therapy program to send official transcripts directly to the South Carolina Board of Occupational Therapy.

steps.title: Verify NBCOT Certification
steps.description: Ensure your National Board for Certification in Occupational Therapy (NBCOT) certification is active and arrange for your scores or certification verification to be sent directly to the Board.

steps.title: Provide License Verifications (Endorsement Only)
steps.description: If applying by endorsement, arrange for official verification of all current and past occupational therapy licenses to be sent directly from each state board to the SC Board of Occupational Therapy.

steps.title: Pay Application Fee
steps.description: Remit the required non-refundable application fee through the LLR Online Services Portal to finalize your application submission.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NBCOT exam.

provisional_text: Many states offer a limited permit or provisional license for new graduates waiting to take the NBCOT exam. Check specific board rules for supervisory requirements.
reciprocity_text: Occupational therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current NBCOT certification.

faqs.question: How much does a South Carolina OT license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies, often around  to . Check the specific fee breakdown.

faqs.question: Is NBCOT certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the NBCOT exam is a standard requirement for initial licensure across all states.

faqs.question: Does South Carolina have reciprocity for occupational therapists?
faqs.answer: South Carolina has enacted the OT Compact, but compact privileges are not yet issuing. For now, occupational therapists still apply by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my occupational therapist license to South Carolina?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in South Carolina while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Occupational therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current NBCOT certification.

hero.title: Become a Occupational Therapist in South Carolina
hero.dek: To apply for an Occupational Therapist license in South Carolina, create an account and submit your application through the LLR Online Services Portal.

official_links.registration_steps: Navigate to the LLR Online Services Portal, click 'New User Registration,' and follow the prompts to create an account. Once registered, log in and select the appropriate Occupational Therapist application type (e.g., 'Licensure by Examination' or 'Licensure by Endorsement').
